report.summary: Researched Aztec Network as an uncovered trending topic, wrote a full 2,800-word learn guide with SEO optimization, scaffolded the Next.js page at /learn/aztec-network-guide, and added it to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic selected: Aztec Network — privacy-first zkRollup L2 on Ethereum, not yet covered on degen0x
Ignition Chain launched November 2025 with 3,500+ sequencers and 50+ provers, zero downtime
TGE passed governance vote January 26, 2026; Uniswap AZTEC/ETH pool opened February 11, 2026
AZTEC token: 10.35B max supply, 14.95% pre-sale at $350M FDV, raised 19,476 ETH from 16,700+ participants
Dual state model: Private Execution Environment (PXE) runs in browser, public state via Aztec VM (AVM)
Noir programming language: Rust-inspired ZK circuit language, backend-agnostic, v1.0 stable in early 2026
Backed by Vitalik Buterin; 65%+ price gain in first 24 hours of trading
Privacy protocols identified as a top crypto narrative for 2026 in a16z and Grayscale outlooks

sections.title: Content Created
items: Full learn guide: 'What Is Aztec Network? The Privacy-First zkRollup on Ethereum' (~2,800 words, 12 min read)
10 sections: Overview, PXE/Dual State, Noir Language, Ignition Chain, AZTEC Tokenomics, Ecosystem, Competitor Comparison Table, Risks (4 callouts), Get Started, FAQ
6-question FAQ section optimized for People Also Ask placement
5 internal links to related degen0x learn pages (zero-knowledge-proofs, layer-2-scaling, privacy-coins, zksync-era, megaeth)
Comparison table: Aztec vs Zcash, Monero, Tornado Cash, Railgun

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title tag (59 chars): 'Aztec Network: Ethereum Privacy L2 Explained 2026 | degen0x'
Primary keywords: 'aztec network guide', 'aztec privacy l2', 'ethereum privacy layer 2'
Meta description (147 chars): specific, includes TGE date and Ignition Chain milestone
Schemas added: ArticleSchema + FAQSchema via combineSchemas()
OpenGraph type: article with publishedTime 2026-03-16T00:00:00Z
Twitter card: summary_large_image configured
Canonical URL set via alternates.canonical
Breadcrumb component included (auto-generates BreadcrumbList schema)
All 14 SEO checklist items: PASS
